meta.title: Tiny Llama
meta.description:
*Google Colab Notebook* https://tinyurl.com/4w6w3cb2

*Jupyter Tiny Llama*
- Chat with TinyLlama (and other Llamas)
- Save and re-upload chats
- Purchase here: https://buy.stripe.com/28ocNyf4pci78EMbJ9

*Video Links*
TinyLlama on Github: https://github.com/jzhang38/TinyLlama
TinyLlama on HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/PY007/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v0.1
TinyLlama Live Training: https://tinyurl.com/2vasff9w
Chinchilla Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.15556
Jupyter Lab Install Guide: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/install-guides

Chapters:
0:00 TinyLlama: A 1.1B Llama 2 model
0:40 The story of TinyLlama
2:25 What is Chinchilla optimal?
5:17 Training TinyLlama
6:33 Run TinyLlama in Google Colab
9:05 Jupyter Tiny Llama
12:36 Recap of TinyLlama's capabilities
